<div class="corpus-disclaimer">
  <strong>免责声明：</strong>本数据库内容仅供参考和教育用途，不构成医疗建议。任何减肥计划的实施，尤其涉及药物治疗和医疗干预，请务必咨询专业医疗人员。
</div>

<div class="corpus-featured">
  <div class="corpus-featured-label">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 17.27L18.18 21l-1.64-7.03L22 9.24l-7.19-.61L12 2 9.19 8.63 2 9.24l5.46 4.73L5.82 21z"/></svg>
    About This Project
  </div>
  <h3>Fat Looser Database</h3>
  <p>
    一个基于循证医学和运动科学的减肥知识体系。所有内容基于权威医学文献、临床指南和运动科学研究，采用 Markdown 格式存储，便于检索、维护和版本管理。适用于普通读者、健身教练、营养咨询师和医疗健康从业者。
  </p>
  <div class="corpus-tag-list">
    <span class="corpus-tag">循证医学</span>
    <span class="corpus-tag">运动科学</span>
    <span class="corpus-tag">营养学</span>
    <span class="corpus-tag">心理学</span>
    <span class="corpus-tag">临床医学</span>
    <span class="corpus-tag">健康管理</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="corpus-section-title">
  <div class="corpus-section-icon">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 13h2v-2H3v2zm0 4h2v-2H3v2zm0-8h2V7H3v2zm4 4h14v-2H7v2zm0 4h14v-2H7v2zM7 7v2h14V7H7z"/></svg>
  </div>
  <h2>模块导航</h2>
</div>

<div class="corpus-module-grid">
  <a href="https://github.com/fat-looser/fat-looser-database/tree/main/01-physiology" target="_blank" class="corpus-module-card coral-accent">
    <div class="card-num">01</div>
    <h3>生理学基础</h3>
    <p class="card-desc">代谢、脂肪形成、能量平衡、激素、身体成分</p>
    <div class="card-arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 4l-1.41 1.41L16.17 11H4v2h12.17l-5.58 5.59L12 20l8-8z"/></svg></div>
  </a>

    <div class="card-num">02</div>
    <h3>减肥心理学</h3>
    <p class="card-desc">动机、行为改变、情绪化饮食、心理障碍</p>
    <div class="card-arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 4l-1.41 1.41L16.17 11H4v2h12.17l-5.58 5.59L12 20l8-8z"/></svg></div>
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/fat-looser/fat-looser-database/tree/main/03-medical" target="_blank" class="corpus-module-card coral-accent">
    <div class="card-num">03</div>
    <h3>医疗干预</h3>
    <p class="card-desc">评估、治疗方案、减重手术、并发症</p>
    <div class="card-arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 4l-1.41 1.41L16.17 11H4v2h12.17l-5.58 5.59L12 20l8-8z"/></svg></div>
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/fat-looser/fat-looser-database/tree/main/04-fitness" target="_blank" class="corpus-module-card coral-accent">
    <div class="card-num">04</div>
    <h3>健身运动</h3>
    <p class="card-desc">有氧、力量训练、HIIT、运动计划、恢复</p>
    <div class="card-arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 4l-1.41 1.41L16.17 11H4v2h12.17l-5.58 5.59L12 20l8-8z"/></svg></div>
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/fat-looser/fat-looser-database/tree/main/05-medication" target="_blank" class="corpus-module-card coral-accent">
    <div class="card-num">05</div>
    <h3>药物治疗</h3>
    <p class="card-desc">合法药物、作用机制、使用指南、副作用</p>
    <div class="card-arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 4l-1.41 1.41L16.17 11H4v2h12.17l-5.58 5.59L12 20l8-8z"/></svg></div>
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/fat-looser/fat-looser-database/tree/main/06-nutrition" target="_blank" class="corpus-module-card green-accent">
    <div class="card-num">06</div>
    <h3>食疗营养</h3>
    <p class="card-desc">饮食原则、营养素、膳食计划、流行饮食法</p>
    <div class="card-arrow"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 4l-1.41 1.41L16.17 11H4v2h12.17l-5.58 5.59L12 20l8-8z"/></svg></div>
  </a>
</div>

<div class="corpus-section-title">
  <div class="corpus-section-icon">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm-2 15l-5-5 1.41-1.41L10 14.17l7.59-7.59L19 8l-9 9z"/></svg>
  </div>
  <h2>科学减重路径</h2>
</div>

<div class="corpus-path">
  <div class="corpus-path-item">
    <div class="corpus-path-num">STEP 01</div>
    <h4>了解身体</h4>
    <p>学习代谢机制、能量平衡和激素对体重的影响</p>
  </div>
  <div class="corpus-path-item">
    <div class="corpus-path-num">STEP 02</div>
    <h4>调整心态</h4>
    <p>建立行为改变策略，培养健康习惯，管理情绪化饮食</p>
  </div>
  <div class="corpus-path-item">
    <div class="corpus-path-num">STEP 03</div>
    <h4>科学行动</h4>
    <p>结合运动、营养和必要时的医疗干预，制定个性化方案</p>
  </div>
</div>
